custom_rims.market_trend: Stable high demand for aesthetic customization

17_inch_forged_wheels.market_trend: Specific to performance racing and off-road setups

USA.notes: Subject to Section 301 (Trade War) and 2026 Section 122 (Trump 2.0) measures.

EU.notes: Standard TARIC rate for road wheels and parts.

Australia.notes: Zero duty under China-Australia Free Trade Agreement (ChAFTA).

voc_buyer_pain_points.description: Custom forged wheels often require 4 to 12 weeks for production and another 2 to 4 weeks for international shipping. Buyers report frustration with delays exceeding 5 months in some cases.
Ensuring exact hub bore, offset (ET), and bolt pattern (PCD) for specific vehicle models is a major concern. Incorrect fitment leads to vibration, fender rubbing, or brake caliper clearance issues.
Buyers seek verification of 6061-T6 aluminum forging quality. Concerns exist regarding the authenticity of JWL, VIA, and TÜV certifications on wheels sourced directly from overseas manufacturers.
